content.text:
Objectifs de l’enseignement
This course will provide the background information needed for the course both in cyber security and big data, and also security and privacy in the Big Data. The using od data science in the cyber security will be presented in this course.
Contenu de la matière
• • • • •
Mode d’évaluation : Contrôle continu, examen Références
•
Background for Big Data Security and Privacy
Big Data Security and Privacy Overview Big Data Security and Privacy Functions
Secure Cloud Computing/Infrastructures for Big Data
Data Science and Cyber Security
Security and Privacy for Big Data, Cloud Computing and Applications, Wei Ren; Lizhe
